name: comfyui-runpod-tools
description: Convenience scripts for comfyui-runpod (container UI dev/build, restarts).

scripts.//compose: Most scripts use -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml so output-sftp is part of the default project (no orphan warnings).
scripts.up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml up -d comfyui watch_queue output-sftp
scripts.up:all: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml --profile ops up -d comfyui watch_queue output-sftp refresh_run_status report_experiment_queue_status queue_incomplete_experiments queue_ledger ws_event_tap
scripts.restart: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml restart comfyui watch_queue output-sftp
scripts.logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml logs -f --tail 200 comfyui watch_queue output-sftp
scripts.logs:comfy: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml logs -f --tail 200 comfyui
scripts.logs:watch: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml logs -f --tail 200 watch_queue
scripts.logs:sftp: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml logs -f --tail 200 output-sftp
scripts.//ops: Sidecars in docker-compose.yml (profile ops). Use up:all or ops:up after npm run up.
scripts.ops:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml --profile ops up -d refresh_run_status report_experiment_queue_status queue_incomplete_experiments queue_ledger ws_event_tap
scripts.ops:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml --profile ops stop refresh_run_status report_experiment_queue_status queue_incomplete_experiments queue_ledger ws_event_tap
scripts.ops:rm: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml --profile ops rm -fsv refresh_run_status report_experiment_queue_status queue_incomplete_experiments queue_ledger ws_event_tap
scripts.ops:ps: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml ps refresh_run_status report_experiment_queue_status queue_incomplete_experiments queue_ledger ws_event_tap
scripts.ops:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml logs -f --tail 200 refresh_run_status report_experiment_queue_status queue_incomplete_experiments queue_ledger ws_event_tap
scripts.status:once: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml exec -T watch_queue python3 /workspace/ws_scripts/refresh_run_status.py --server http://comfyui:8188
scripts.report:once: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml exec -T watch_queue python3 /workspace/ws_scripts/report_experiment_queue_status.py --server http://comfyui:8188 --newest-first --limit 10 --summary-only
scripts.report:tail: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml exec -T report_experiment_queue_status sh -lc "tail -n 80 /workspace/output/output/experiments/_status/queue_status.log"
scripts.history:backfill: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml exec -T watch_queue python3 /workspace/ws_scripts/backfill_history_from_outputs.py --server http://comfyui:8188 --try-fetch-history --extract-media-metadata
scripts.//tests: Python tests live under workspace/tests and are runnable inside the comfyui container.
scripts.test:py: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml exec -T comfyui sh -lc "cd /workspace && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' -v"
scripts.test:unit: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml exec -T comfyui sh -lc "cd /workspace/tests && python3 -m unittest -v test_apply_comfy_preset test_canonicalize_comfy_titles test_clean_comfy_workflow test_extract_comfy_preset test_tune_experiment_unit"
scripts.test:integration: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml exec -T comfyui sh -lc "cd /workspace/tests && python3 -m unittest -v test_integration_media_roundtrip"
scripts.test:acceptance: node -e "console.log('No acceptance tests defined yet.'); process.exit(0)"
scripts.//ui: Experiments UI: cross-platform via node scripts/experiments-ui-dev.mjs; PowerShell helpers optional on Windows.
scripts.ui:dev:container: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml exec comfyui bash -lc "cd /workspace/experiments_ui/web && (test -d node_modules || npm install) && export EXPERIMENTS_UI_PROXY_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:8790 && export EXPERIMENTS_UI_DEV_PORT=5178 && CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=true npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.ui:build:docker: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml exec -T comfyui sh -lc "cd /workspace/experiments_ui/web && (test -f package-lock.json && npm ci || npm install) && npm run build"
scripts.//compat: Back-compat aliases for older script names.
scripts.comfy:restart: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml restart comfyui
scripts.comfy:recreate: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.output-sftp.yml up -d --force-recreate comfyui
